items.desc_en: Dry cut with scissors or clippers, shaped and finished to your style.
items.desc_zh: 使用剪刀或推剪修剪，按您喜欢的发型塑形修整。

items.desc_en: Relaxing shampoo followed by a precision cut and blow dry.
items.desc_zh: 舒适洗发后，进行精准剪发并吹干定型。

items.desc_en: Waves, curls, or textured styles to suit your look and lifestyle.
items.desc_zh: 波浪、卷发或纹理造型，打造符合您风格与生活方式的发型。

items.desc_en: Root touch-ups, full colour, or fashion shades to refresh your look.
items.desc_zh: 补根、全染或时尚色调，轻松焕新造型。

items.desc_en: Full cleanse, deep condition, and a smooth blow-dry finish.
items.desc_zh: 彻底洗发、深层护发，再配合吹干定型。

items.desc_en: Precision dry cut tailored to your face shape and personal style.
items.desc_zh: 按脸型与个人风格量身定制的精准干剪。

items.desc_en: Wash, condition, custom cut, and blow dry — the complete service.
items.desc_zh: 洗发、护发、量身剪发，再吹干定型——一站式完整护理。

items.desc_en: Deep conditioning mask to restore shine, softness, and strength.
items.desc_zh: 深层护发膜，恢复光泽、柔软度与强韧度。

items.desc_en: Classic or digital perm for waves, curls, or added volume.
items.desc_zh: 传统或数码烫发，打造波浪、卷发或蓬松感。

items.desc_en: Full colour, highlights, or balayage to brighten and refresh your look.
items.desc_zh: 全染、挑染或渐染，提亮并焕新您的造型。

items.desc_en: Heat-set digital waves or protein-based rebonding for smooth, straight hair.
items.desc_zh: 热塑数码波浪或蛋白质离子烫，打造顺滑直发。
